memoryArtifacts.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
memoryArtifacts.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Welles於1308年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比時，他的父親Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles37歲，母親Joan Engaine29歲。他於1335年6月23日之前與Agnes Davie在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1351年6月23日之前在英國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Welles was born in 1308, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, was 37 and his mother, Joan Engaine, was 29. He married Agnes Davie before 23 June 1335, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 23 June 1351, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Welles est né en 1308, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Engaine, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Davie avant 23 juin 1335, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 23 juin 1351, à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Wellesが1308年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Welles Lord Wellesは37歳，母Joan Engaineは29歳であった。1335年6月23日以前にイギリスでAgnes Davieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年6月23日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Welles(이)가 1308년 영국 링코실르 스피스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Engaine(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1335년 6월 23일 이전 영국에서 Agnes Davie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1351년 6월 23일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Welles родился в 1308 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Engaine, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Davie перед 23 июнь 1335 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 23 июнь 1351 г. в местности Англия.
